title: Everybody’s Everything
tmdbOverview: The story of artist Lil Peep from his birth in Long Island and meteoric rise as a genre blending pop star & style icon, to his death due to an accidental opioid overdose in Arizona at just 21 years of age.
synopsis: Released in 2019, Everybody’s Everything is a documentary film from United States. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a K-16 certification (FI rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
